findings.text: NAP-SRC-0066 email states it includes two attachments: Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf and Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf.
The extracted text artifact (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0066) does not contain the content of the two referenced PDF attachments; they were not extracted by the pdf_text method.
Missing attachment content may contain key terms (e.g., tenancy obligations, charges schedule) relevant to the matter scope napier-accommodation-arrears.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a tool capable of extracting embedded PDF attachments (e.g., pdfdetach or similar) from source NAP-SRC-0066. Extract the two attachments: 'Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf' and 'Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf'. Save each as a separate source file in the 01-sources/communications/ directory with appropriate source IDs (e.g., NAP-SRC-0066-att1, NAP-SRC-0066-att2). Then run text extraction on each.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded attachments from NAP-SRC-0066 PDF

risk_flags.description: Embedded attachments not extracted; may contain critical contractual terms.

summary: The extracted text of NAP-SRC-0066 references two embedded PDF attachments (Tenancy Agreement 2025-26.pdf and Student Misconduct and Schedule of Charges 2025-26.pdf) but the extraction artifact does not contain their content. The attachments were not extracted by the pdf_text method. A follow-up task is proposed to extract the embedded attachments using a tool capable of handling PDF attachments.

uncertainties.reason: The extraction method (pdf_text) does not extract embedded PDF attachments; their content is unknown.
